content: Automated grading of student HTML/CSS/JS: pattern is jsdom-parsed DOM diffed against a model DOM (tag/attribute/nesting checks), CSS graded by reading computed style properties off key elements and comparing to expected values (not raw source-code text diff), JS graded by verifying event listeners are bound and produce the correct side effect. Udacity js-grader is the closest reference implementation (branching/partial-credit grading, not exact-match).
